sourcesContent:
import React, { useState, useEffect } from 'react'; export default function AdminOverview() { const [stats, setStats] = useState({ totalUsers: 156, activeUsers: 142, totalFolders: 428, analyzedFolders: 385, aiAnalyses: 1203, alerts: 12, permissionGroups: 8, lastBackup: new Date(Date.now() - 2 * 24 * 60 * 60 * 1000), }); const [systemHealth, setSystemHealth] = useState({ database: { status: 'healthy', uptime: '99.8%' }, api: { status: 'healthy', uptime: '99.9%' }, storage: { status: 'healthy', usage: '62%' }, security: { status: 'secure', alerts: 2 }, }); const [recentActivities, setRecentActivities] = useState([ { id: 1, user: 'jean.dupont@mail.com', action: 'Connexion', timestamp: new Date(Date.now() - 5 * 60 * 1000), type: 'login' }, { id: 2, user: 'marie.martin@mail.com', action: 'Création dossier', timestamp: new Date(Date.now() - 15 * 60 * 1000), type: 'create' }, { id: 3, user: 'Admin System', action: 'Modification rôle', timestamp: new Date(Date.now() - 1 * 60 * 60 * 1000), type: 'update' }, { id: 4, user: 'pierre.bernard@mail.com', action: 'Téléchargement rapport', timestamp: new Date(Date.now() - 2 * 60 * 60 * 1000), type: 'download' }, { id: 5, user: 'admin@cyber.fr', action: 'Suppression utilisateur', timestamp: new Date(Date.now() - 3 * 60 * 60 * 1000), type: 'delete' }, ]); const formatDate = (date) => { const now = new Date(); const diff = Math.floor((now - date) / 1000); if (diff < 60) return `${diff}s ago`; if (diff < 3600) return `${Math.floor(diff / 60)}m ago`; if (diff < 86400) return `${Math.floor(diff / 3600)}h ago`; return date.toLocaleDateString('fr-FR'); }; const getActivityIcon = (type) => { const icons = { login: '🔓', create: '✨', update: '✏️', download: '⬇️', delete: '🗑️', }; return icons[type] || '📝'; }; const getStatusColor = (status) => { return status === 'healthy' || status === 'secure' ? '#4DFFB4' : status === 'healthy' ? '#00D4FF' : '#FFB347'; }; return (
👥 Utilisateurs actifs
{stats.activeUsers}
+8 cette semaine
📂 Dossiers analysés
{stats.analyzedFolders}
+45 cette semaine
🤖 Analyses IA
{stats.aiAnalyses}
+230 cette semaine
⚠️ Alertes actives
{stats.alerts}
À traiter

💚 État du système

{Object.entries(systemHealth).map(([key, value]) => (
{key === 'database' ? '🗄️ Base de données' : key === 'api' ? '⚙️ API' : key === 'storage' ? '💾 Stockage' : '🔐 Sécurité'} ● {value.status === 'healthy' || value.status === 'secure' ? 'Opérationnel' : 'Dégradé'}
{key === 'storage' ? ( <> {value.usage}
) : key === 'security' ? ( {value.alerts} alertes ) : ( Uptime: {value.uptime} )}
))}

📊 Activités récentes

Voir tous les logs →
{recentActivities.map((activity) => (
{getActivityIcon(activity.type)}
{activity.user}
{activity.action}
{formatDate(activity.timestamp)}
))}

⚡ Actions rapides

✓ Dernière sauvegarde

{stats.lastBackup.toLocaleDateString('fr-FR', { day: 'numeric', month: 'long', year: 'numeric', hour: '2-digit', minute: '2-digit' })}

); }
